subcodes.first_line: O Thou Knower of mysteries! Make this servant, filled with utter powerlessness and need, through Thy confirmations and grace, an intimate companion and confidant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دانای راز اين بنده پر عجز و نياز را به تأييد و توفيق خويش همدم و همراز نما
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @entry by troops, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant
